nasb.text: And while some were talking about the temple, that it was adorned with beautiful stones and votive gifts, He said,

esv.text: And while some were speaking of the temple, how it was adorned with noble stones and offerings, he said,

cnv.text: 有人在談論聖殿，是用美麗的石頭和供物裝飾的。耶穌說：

ccb.text: 有些人正在谈论由精美的石头和珍贵的供物所装饰的圣殿，

csbs.text: 有些人谈论到圣殿，说它是用精美的石头和供奉的礼物装饰的。耶稣就说：
